scripts.deploy:stage:user-application: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter user-application deploy:stage
scripts.deploy:prod:user-application: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter user-application deploy:prod
scripts.deploy:stage:data-service: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter data-service deploy:stage
scripts.deploy:prod:data-service: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter data-service deploy:prod
scripts.types: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter data-service --filter user-application --if-present types
